


# Projects

## [Global Life Expectancy Analysis](analysis.qmd)
- Visualized life expectancy 
- Compared life expectancy among selected countries 

## COVID-19 Vaccination Analysis
- Time-series analysis of vaccination trends  
- Identified gaps in coverage  
- Provided data-driven recommendations  

## Risk Factor Analysis
- Explored association between lifestyle and disease  
- Statistical modelling  
- Identified key predictors  

## Health Inequality Study
- Compared demographic groups  
- Highlighted disparities  
- Suggested policy insights
